def positive_linear_search_helper_called_from_nested_loops():
    rule_id = "linear_search_helper_called_from_nested_loops"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag nested loops that call helpers performing linear scans on each iteration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
